overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Last of Us Part II showing two characters, Ellie and Lev, walking through a flooded, overgrown urban canyon with abandoned skyscrapers. The scene features post-apocalyptic atmosphere with dense vegetation reclaiming the concrete environment under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded downtown street with overgrown ruins

agents.ego_description: Ellie walking steadily through the flooded street following Lev

notable_agents.action: Lev walking ahead through the flooded path leading the way

entered.detail: Tall abandoned glass and concrete office building covered in vines and damage
Massive modern skyscraper looming in the distance through the haze
Dense green trees and bushes reclaiming the urban environment
Thick foliage and trees lining the right side of the flooded street
Water-covered road surface reflecting the gray sky
Abandoned car partially submerged in water and overgrowth
Sagging power lines stretching across the street between buildings

segments.scene_description: Ellie follows Lev through a flooded urban canyon flanked by derelict office towers and dense overgrowth. The overcast sky casts diffused light over the water-covered street as they navigate between abandoned vehicles and concrete ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded downtown approach to central skyscraper

events.description: Ellie raises her left arm while walking forward

agents.ego_description: Ellie continues walking and briefly raises her left arm while approaching the deeper flooded section

notable_agents.action: Lev continuing to walk ahead toward the skyscraper

entered.detail: Broken concrete wall or structure partially submerged in water

segments.scene_description: The pair continues deeper into the flooded downtown area, with a massive abandoned skyscraper looming larger ahead. Ellie briefly raises her arm while walking as the camera follows their steady progression through the post-apocalyptic cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a flooded urban canyon that gradually narrows as the characters approach a looming skyscraper. It begins with Ellie following Lev through a water-covered street flanked by derelict office towers and dense overgrowth under a diffused, overcast sky. As they navigate between abandoned vehicles and concrete ruins, the camera maintains a steady progression deeper into the drowned downtown area. The scene then shifts to emphasize the scale of the environment as a massive abandoned skyscraper grows larger in the frame, while Ellie briefly raises her arm during their walk. The movement finally settles into a focused advance toward the towering structure, further immersing the pair in the post-apocalyptic cityscape.
